ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pinball_machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pinball machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the pinball machine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the pinball machine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the pinball machine */,
  "year_of_production" INTEGER /* Year the pinball machine was produced */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the pinball machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the pinball machine was installed */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pinball machine */,
  "season_average" INTEGER /* Average score for the season */,
  "season_high" INTEGER /* Highest score for the season */,
  "season_low" INTEGER /* Lowest score for the season */,
  "season_plays" INTEGER /* Number of plays during the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "duration" REAL /* Average duration of a game session */,
  "player_engagement_score" REAL /* Player engagement score */,
  "machine_reliability_score" REAL /* Machine reliability score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES pinball_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pinball machine */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date the next service is due */,
  "service_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "machine_status_after_service" TEXT /* Status of the machine after maintenance (e.g., operational, needs further review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES pinball_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the technician */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the technician */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the technician (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each pinball machine
Year the pinball machine was produced
Physical location of the pinball machine
Date the pinball machine was installed
Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, out of service)
